nodes.description: Initial registration request is accepted by the network

properties.condition: Initial registration request is accepted by the network

outcomes.outcome: Initial registration request cannot be accepted by the network

nodes.description: 5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message

properties.condition: 5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message

outcomes.outcome: AMF starts timer T3550 and enters state 5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED
No 5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE

nodes.description: UE resets the registration attempt counter, enters state 5GMM-REGISTERED and sets the 5GS update status to 5U1 UPDATED

The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Network slicing indication IE with the Network slicing subscription change indication set to 'Network slicing subscription changed', a Configured NSSAI IE with a new configured NSSAI, an NSSRG information IE with a new NSSRG information, an Alternative NSSAI IE with a new alternative NSSAI, an S-NSSAI location validity information in the Registration accept type 6 IE container IE with a new S-NSSAI location validity information, an S-NSSAI time validity information IE with a new S-NSSAI time validity information, or an On-demand NSSAI IE with a new on-demand NSSAI or an updated slice deregistration inactivity timer value

properties.condition: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Network slicing indication IE with the Network slicing subscription change indication set to 'Network slicing subscription changed', a Configured NSSAI IE with a new configured NSSAI, an NSSRG information IE with a new NSSRG information, an Alternative NSSAI IE with a new alternative NSSAI, an S-NSSAI location validity information in the Registration accept type 6 IE container IE with a new S-NSSAI location validity information, an S-NSSAI time validity information IE with a new S-NSSAI time validity information, or an On-demand NSSAI IE with a new on-demand NSSAI or an updated slice deregistration inactivity timer value

outcomes.outcome: UE returns a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge the successful update of the network slicing information

The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the Network slicing indication IE with the Network slicing subscription change indication set to 'Network slicing subscription changed', a Configured NSSAI IE with a new configured NSSAI, an NSSRG information IE with a new NSSRG information, an Alternative NSSAI IE with a new alternative NSSAI, an S-NSSAI location validity information in the Registration accept type 6 IE container IE with a new S-NSSAI location validity information, an S-NSSAI time validity information IE with a new S-NSSAI time validity information, or an On-demand NSSAI IE with a new on-demand NSSAI or an updated slice deregistration inactivity timer value

nodes.description: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had set the CAG bit to 'CAG supported' in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message

properties.condition: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had set the CAG bit to 'CAG supported' in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message

outcomes.outcome: UE replaces the 'CAG information list' stored in the UE with the received CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE when received in the HPLMN or EHPLMN, replaces the serving VPLMN's entry of the 'CAG information list' stored in the UE with the serving VPLMN's entry of the received CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE when the UE receives the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE in a serving PLMN other than the HPLMN or EHPLMN, or removes the serving VPLMN's entry of the 'CAG information list' stored in the UE when the UE receives the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE in a serving PLMN other than the HPLMN or EHPLMN and the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE does not contain the serving VPLMN's entry

The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had not set the CAG bit to 'CAG supported' in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message

nodes.description: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE

properties.condition: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE

outcomes.outcome: UE returns a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the operator-defined access category definitions, the extended local emergency numbers list or the 'CAG information list'

The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE

nodes.description: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE

properties.condition: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE

outcomes.outcome: UE returns a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE
The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE

nodes.description: Upon receiving a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message, the AMF stops timer T3550 and changes to state 5GMM-REGISTERED
The AMF sends a REGISTRATION REJECT message to the UE including an appropriate 5GMM cause value

properties.condition: Initial registration request is accepted by the network
Initial registration request cannot be accepted by the network
5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message
properties.outcome: AMF starts timer T3550 and enters state 5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED

properties.condition: No 5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE
properties.outcome: UE resets the registration attempt counter, enters state 5GMM-REGISTERED and sets the 5GS update status to 5U1 UPDATED

properties.outcome: UE returns a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge the successful update of the network slicing information

properties.condition: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the Network slicing indication IE with the Network slicing subscription change indication set to 'Network slicing subscription changed', a Configured NSSAI IE with a new configured NSSAI, an NSSRG information IE with a new NSSRG information, an Alternative NSSAI IE with a new alternative NSSAI, an S-NSSAI location validity information in the Registration accept type 6 IE container IE with a new S-NSSAI time validity information, or an On-demand NSSAI IE with a new on-demand NSSAI or an updated slice deregistration inactivity timer value

The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE
properties.outcome: UE returns a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the operator-defined access category definitions, the extended local emergency numbers list or the 'CAG information list'

properties.condition: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE
The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE
